questionHtml: State the conclusion of the test in context, justifying your answer.
markschemeHtml:
0.0170<0.05          R1

hence there is sufficient evidence to reject the null hypothesis that the development of cracks and the technique used are independent.          A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1.

[2 marks]
